ddls:
CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer or company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the apps */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the developer */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Support email for the developer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the developer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the developer */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the developer company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "in_app_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each in-app purchase */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application this purchase belongs to */,
  "purchase_description" TEXT /* Description of the in-app purchase */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the in-app purchase */,
  "purchase_type" TEXT /* Type of in-app purchase (e.g., consumable, non-consumable, subscription) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating score given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, marketing) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app update */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the update */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding changes in the update */,
  "build_number" TEXT /* Build number of the update */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_categories" (
  "app_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app-genre association */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_categories_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug report, feature request, general feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON string of the report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
